name: Excel Industries Limited
summary: Excel Industries Limited manufactures and sells chemicals and pharma intermediates in India. It offers agrochemical intermediates, specialty, mining, and performance chemicals, polymer inputs, and pharmaceutical intermediates and active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs); casscel, phosphorous derivatives, biocides, and phosphonates; and veterinary APIs. The company is also involved in financing activities. It also exports its products. Excel Industries Limited was founded in 1941 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
